purpose: Measure whether fixed three-receptor mean-score coverage-QUBO is robust to five preregistered scaffold fold assignments without evaluating the locked test split.
interpretation_boundary: These repeats use different scaffold partitions of the same 160 development ligands. They assess partition robustness but are not an independent biological benchmark. Averaged OOF metrics are exploratory repeated-CV diagnostics. The 40 locked test ligands remain unavailable and no repeated-CV result alone authorizes test release.
